Method.Name: constructAndInitCopying
Method.Source:
public void constructAndInitCopying(TmpFrmVirtual _tmpFrmVirtualLines, TmpFrmVirtual _tmpFrmVirtualHeader, Qty _qtyFactor, NoYes _reverseSign, NoYes _recalculateAmount, NoYes _copyMarkup, NoYes _copyPrecisely, NoYes _deleteLines, VendInvoiceJour _vendInvoiceJour) { next constructAndInitCopying(_tmpFrmVirtualLines, _tmpFrmVirtualHeader, _qtyFactor, _reverseSign, _recalculateAmount, _copyMarkup, _copyPrecisely, _deleteLines, _vendInvoiceJour);
contract.parmCopyHeaderTextBlock(copyHeaderTB); contract.parmCopyLineTextBlock(copyLineTB); }

Method.Name: parmCopyHeaderTextBlock
parmCopyLineTextBlock
